meta.title: XICO AI｜智希可 — AI Products, Software & Digital Platforms
meta.description: XICO AI builds AI products, software and digital platforms, connecting China, Japan and the world. We turn ideas into things people open every day — and keep.

hero.eyebrow: XICO AI · Connecting China, Japan & the world
hero.subtitle: Technology dates; things that work don't. We build products — and the kind you still want to open long after, from a single sentence to something living quietly in someone's day.
hero.stack: AI Products · Mobile Apps · Web Platforms · Digital Systems

capabilities.title: What we build
capabilities.subtitle: More than how much new tech went in, we care about one thing: whether it's good to use, and whether it lasts.

items.title: AI Products
items.desc: Make large models and agents actually work — steadily, not stranded in a pretty demo.

items.title: Digital Platforms
items.desc: From checkout to back office, front of house to behind it — one system that truly runs.

items.title: Mobile & Web Experiences
items.desc: Good-looking is the floor. The hard part is feel — the kind that brings people back.

items.title: Systems That Scale
items.desc: Foundations you can lean on: easy to fix, room to grow, and they don't fall over as you do.

work.title: Built for real life
work.subtitle: We don't just take on projects — we build our own. Machi and Shangence are two we're raising by hand.

items.name: Machi
items.tagline: Find the echoes of life in every city
items.desc: For people making a life away from home — students, new arrivals, and anyone still learning a city.
items.about: Machi is a digital life platform for people living abroad — students, new immigrants, city wanderers. City info, community, housing, jobs, classifieds, local services, and the real experience of those who came before — all here, to help you turn a strange city, little by little, into your own.

items.name: Shangence
items.desc: A risk read for people starting small — before the first dollar, see with data whether to step in.
items.about: Before you commit your first capital, Shangence does the math with you: cash safety, market demand, your own capability, customer acquisition, outside constraints — five angles, end to end. Out comes a validation budget, a stop-loss line, and a 30-day plan. It won't promise you'll win; it just shows you the risk early. Run separately in China and Japan.

items.name: More on the way
items.desc: New lines are incubating, carrying XICO's craft to further markets.
items.about: New lines — study-abroad, cross-border commerce — are taking root, carrying the craft we've built in AI, product and design somewhere further and wider.

approach.title: How we work
approach.subtitle: Four principles, running through everything we make.

principles.title: AI-native
principles.desc: AI is the foundation, not a button bolted on after.

principles.title: Design-led
principles.desc: Taste and feel are the edge, all on their own.

principles.title: Built to last
principles.desc: Systems you can fix, grow, and trust to outlast the moment.

principles.title: Globally minded
principles.desc: From day one, made with several languages and markets in mind.

cta.title: Got something you've been wanting to build?
cta.subtitle: Even if it's still one sentence, or half a product — let's talk. Whatever can be built, we'll build with you.

footer.tagline: Things that actually run — made with AI, engineering and design. Connecting China, Japan and the world.

about.title: Technology should move toward people, not away.
about.subtitle: XICO AI｜智希可 is a product and technology company connecting China, Japan and global markets.
story: The stronger technology gets, the colder it can feel. We want the opposite — to let it step back, so people come a little closer to their own lives.
We build AI, software and products. But what we really hold close is where it lands: whose hands, and whether it's easy and kind to use.
We're not a big company, and we don't make big claims. We'd rather do a few things well — things that last, and travel beyond one market.

items.title: Build what matters
items.desc: Not building for its own sake — only what someone truly needs.

items.title: Make complexity feel simple
items.desc: However complex underneath, it should feel simple in your hands.

items.title: Think globally, sweat the details
items.desc: Made for the world, every corner cleaned up.

founder.name: Yao Kai · 姚凱
founder.quote: The best products grow along the seam where engineering meets design.
bio: I believe real product strength comes from carrying one thing all the way through — from finding the problem, defining it and designing the experience, to launch, payments, support and back office. Not stopping at an idea.

I work full-stack, tying front-end, mobile, back-end, databases and cloud into one coherent product — and I sweat the unglamorous parts that make a service actually run: payments, admin, legal, security.
I move between Chinese, Japanese and English, working across cultures. XICO is where that belief becomes product.

services.title: From an idea to a real launch.
services.subtitle: The full range of product capability is here — or we can lend a hand on just the stretch you need.

sections.title: AI Engineering
sections.desc: Turn large models and agents into something steady, controllable, and ready to ship.

sections.title: Product Design
sections.desc: Define brand and experience through design, so people trust it at first glance.

sections.title: Software Engineering
sections.desc: From front-end to cloud, build the whole system clean, maintainable, and able to hold.

sections.title: Growth & Global
sections.desc: Take products across borders and markets — wiring China to the world.

blog.empty: Still a blank page here — give it a little time.

process.title: From one sentence to launch day
process.subtitle: No flowcharts to dazzle you. Honestly, it's just these few steps — and someone owns each one.

steps.title: Hear you out first
steps.desc: What you're solving, who it's for, how urgent. Knowing what to build is often harder than how.

steps.title: Think it through, then draw it
steps.desc: Turn a fuzzy notion into something you can see and tap. Get the direction right before the first line of code.

steps.title: Build it, line by line
steps.desc: Design, front-end, back-end, data, cloud — everything that should connect, connects. Nothing dropped in between.

steps.title: Launch is the beginning
steps.desc: Payments, admin, support, monitoring… get it truly running, then stay with it.

faq.title: A few questions we often get
faq.subtitle: If yours isn't here, just write and ask.

items.q: Do you take client work, or build your own products?
items.a: Both. We raise Machi and Shangence ourselves — and the same people, the same craft, help others build theirs.

items.q: Can I come to you with just a rough idea?
items.a: That's exactly the right time. Most things start as a single sentence. Making the idea clear, and deciding whether it's worth building, is the first step worth taking together.

items.q: How long does a project take?
items.a: Depends how big it is. A usable first version is usually weeks to a few months. We'd rather start small and solid, then let it grow.
We don't walk away. Payments, admin, monitoring, someone there when something breaks — that's where a product actually stays alive. We prefer to stay with it a while.

items.q: Can you work in Chinese, Japanese and English?
items.a: Yes. We already work across all three. Several languages and markets are considered from day one, not translated in afterwards.
Send an email, or fill in the contact form, and tell us what you want to build. We usually reply within a day or two.

manifesto.title: What matters is whether it's still here in three years.
body: Launch is just the start. We'd rather go slow and make one thing solid — solid enough that, long after, someone still wants to open it.
Plenty of things make noise; few of them stay. We're trying to make the kind that stays.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Changsha Zhixike Technology Co., Ltd. (“XICO AI”, “we”) respects and protects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect on xicoai.com, how we use it, and the rights you have.

sections.p: When you contact us through a form, a partnership enquiry or a job application, we collect the information you choose to provide — such as your name, email, company, message, and the résumé file you upload when applying. We also collect basic technical logs (time of visit, pages, device type) to keep the site secure and stable.

We use this information only to respond to your enquiries, process collaboration or job applications, and operate and improve the site. We do not sell your personal information or use it for unrelated purposes.
Information is stored on servers under our control and protected with reasonable technical and organizational measures. We keep it only as long as needed for the purposes above.
We use only essential local storage to remember your theme (light/dark) and language preference. We do not use it for cross-site tracking.
You can contact us at hi@xicoai.com at any time to access, correct or delete your personal information.
We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on this page. Questions? Email hi@xicoai.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service

sections.p: This site presents XICO AI's products, capabilities and company information, and provides ways to get in touch.

Unless otherwise stated, the text, design, marks and content of this site belong to XICO AI and may not be copied or used commercially without permission. Third-party brand marks belong to their respective owners.
Content on this site is provided “as is”. We aim to keep it accurate but make no warranty as to its completeness or timeliness.
To the extent permitted by law, XICO AI is not liable for any indirect or incidental loss arising from use of this site.
These terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China.
For any questions about these terms, contact hi@xicoai.com.
